refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle to meet or exceed the customer-defined target under specified duty cycle and site conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the high-level cycle time KPI into a focused FR that explicitly targets minimizing cycle time ensures clarity and testability. It aligns with the acceptance criteria and stakeholder expectations for productivity.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the 95th percentile cycle time (p95) during representative duty cycles and site conditions, comparing against the customer-defined CT_target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive cycle time optimization algorithm
DP2: Real-time telemetry-based cycle monitoring and adjustment
DP3: Modular operation scheduling with dynamic tasking
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive cycle time optimization algorithm

potential_sources: Interaction between load, travel, and dump phases
coupling_check.notes: The adaptive algorithm logically decouples cycle phases but requires telemetry input, which is managed via defined interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable and low-latency telemetry data
Risk of suboptimal performance if site conditions vary beyond modeled parameters
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating fallback strategies for telemetry loss or degraded network conditions.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Implements the adaptive cycle time optimization algorithm encompassing load, travel, and dump cycle phases.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time vehicle and environment data to inform cycle optimization.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends optimized operation schedules to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Core logic centralized here; minimal diffusion.
Executes tasks but does not contain optimization logic.
Receives tasking but no optimization logic.
No direct role in cycle time optimization.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the adaptive optimization algorithm within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex.
Dependency on timely telemetry data may create coupling risks.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider partitioning if performance degrades; ensure robust telemetry interface handling.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive cycle time optimization algorithm) directly addresses the refined FR and supports measurable verification.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion as optimization logic is centralized.
Telemetry dependency managed via defined interface.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the primary module, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible within the NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of optimization logic to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces to Vehicle and Teleoperation.

recommended_revisions: Add fallback mechanisms for telemetry loss in DP and IM.
Refine sub-FRs for load, travel, and dump phases in next decomposition level.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, the high safety criticality and telemetry dependency warrant explicit fallback strategies and more detailed sub-FRs for load, travel, and dump phases to reduce risk.

revise.why: To incorporate fallback strategies for telemetry loss and to refine sub-FRs for better risk mitigation and clarity.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
Cycle time optimization can be effectively centralized.
open_risks: Telemetry data loss or degradation impacting optimization.
Complexity of NGHE Solution module affecting performance.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data latency and reliability statistics.
Performance benchmarks of adaptive optimization algorithm.
